calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Application To Set Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Spencer Martinez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff J. Avery Enterprises, Inc dba Klein's Deli and Catering.
Plaintiff Witness J. Avery McGinn, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Krisinda Messer (Nee Krisinda) and The American Backflow Company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $435,806.53
Prejudgment Interest - $28,536.14
Costs - $2,397.72, for a total judgment in the amount of $466,740.39

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Continued To Jun-29-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Mar-29-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
